description: Style note This kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look Product detailsWhite printed kurta with a V neck, short sleeve, sequined mock chest placket and a vented hemMaterial and careBlended fabricDry clean only Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8& rdquo and chest 33& rdquo ) is wearing size S
